metadata.description: Scavenger hunts across web, documentation, and code

hunts.name: Git Documentation Explorer
hunts.description: Gina Git's scavenger hunt: Master the official docs

tasks.task: Find the official Git documentation for 'git reflog'
tasks.deliverable: Link and one useful option you discovered

tasks.task: Find GitHub's guide on resolving merge conflicts
tasks.deliverable: Link and brief summary of recommended approach

tasks.task: Find a git cheat sheet (official or highly-rated)
tasks.deliverable: Link and your 3 favorite commands from it

bonus.task: Find the Pro Git book online (free) and read one chapter

hunts.name: Python Packaging Deep Dive
hunts.description: Vinny Virtual's hunt: Understand Python packaging

tasks.task: Find the official Python Packaging User Guide
tasks.deliverable: Link to the main page

tasks.task: Find documentation on pyproject.toml format
tasks.deliverable: Link and list 3 required/common fields

tasks.task: Find the difference between setup.py and pyproject.toml
tasks.deliverable: Explanation of when to use each

tasks.task: Find TestPyPI (test package index) documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and steps to publish a test package

bonus.task: Find and summarize PEP 517 (build system specification)

hunts.name: Testing Tools Discovery
hunts.description: Tessa Test's hunt: Explore testing tools

tasks.task: Find the pytest documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and list 3 useful command-line options

tasks.task: Find documentation on pytest fixtures
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain 'scope' parameter

tasks.task: Find pytest-cov documentation (coverage plugin)
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain what coverage percentage to aim for

tasks.task: Find hypothesis library (property-based testing)
tasks.deliverable: Link and one-paragraph explanation of what it does

bonus.task: Find pytest's list of plugins and pick one interesting one to explore

hunts.name: Code Quality Tools Safari
hunts.description: Rita Readable's hunt: Discover quality tools

tasks.task: Find the Black code formatter documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain the 'uncompromising' philosophy

tasks.task: Find ruff (fast Python linter) documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and list 3 things it can check for

tasks.task: Find mypy (type checker) documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain 'strict mode'

tasks.task: Find pre-commit documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and example .pre-commit-config.yaml

bonus.task: Set up pre-commit with black, ruff, and mypy on a test project

hunts.name: Open Source Exploration
hunts.description: Oliver Open-Source's hunt: Explore real projects

tasks.task: Find a scientific Python project with 'good first issue' labels
tasks.deliverable: Link to project and one good first issue

tasks.task: Find a project's CONTRIBUTING.md guide
tasks.deliverable: Link and summarize the contribution process

tasks.task: Find a well-written pull request with good code review
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain what makes the review good

tasks.task: Find GitHub's guide on open source contribution
tasks.deliverable: Link and 3 key tips

bonus.task: Find and fix a typo in any open source project (submit PR!)

tasks.task: Find GitHub Actions documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link to main docs page

tasks.task: Find documentation on workflow syntax
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain 'matrix' strategy

tasks.task: Find the actions/setup-python action documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and list available options

tasks.task: Find a reusable workflow example
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain when reusable workflows help

tasks.task: Find documentation on secrets management in Actions
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain how to use secrets safely

bonus.task: Create a workflow that tests on multiple Python versions (3.9, 3.10, 3.11)

hunts.name: Documentation Tools Quest
hunts.description: Doc Douglas's hunt: Documentation deep dive

tasks.task: Find Sphinx documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and list 3 output formats Sphinx supports

tasks.task: Find Read the Docs service documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain how to set up automatic doc building

tasks.task: Find Google or NumPy docstring style guide
tasks.deliverable: Link and show an example docstring

tasks.task: Find MkDocs (alternative to Sphinx) documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and compare to Sphinx (when to use each)

bonus.task: Build and deploy documentation for a small project to GitHub Pages or RTD

hunts.name: MCP Discovery Quest
hunts.description: Morgan MCP's hunt: Explore the MCP ecosystem

tasks.task: Find the official MCP specification
tasks.deliverable: Link to specification

tasks.task: Find the Python MCP SDK documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and list available decorators/functions

tasks.task: Find examples of MCP servers for scientific tools
tasks.deliverable: Links to 2-3 examples with descriptions

tasks.task: Find documentation on MCP tool schemas
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain how to define tool parameters

bonus.task: Create a simple MCP server that provides a useful tool for your research

hunts.name: Course Code Explorer
hunts.description: Explore patterns in course notebooks and examples

tasks.task: Find an example of a pytest fixture in course code
tasks.deliverable: File and line number, plus what it does

tasks.task: Find an example of type hints in course code
tasks.deliverable: File and function showing type hints

tasks.task: Find the course's pyproject.toml or setup configuration
tasks.deliverable: File location and list of dependencies

bonus.task: Find a potential improvement in course code and suggest a fix

hunts.name: AI-Assisted Development Resources
hunts.description: Claude Coder's hunt: AI development resources

tasks.task: Find Anthropic's documentation on Claude
tasks.deliverable: Link to main documentation

tasks.task: Find best practices for prompting code assistants
tasks.deliverable: Link and 3 key tips

tasks.task: Find an article about limitations of AI code generation
tasks.deliverable: Link and main concerns raised

bonus.task: Document a coding session showing effective AI collaboration

hunts.name: Security Best Practices
hunts.description: Learn about security in software development

tasks.task: Find GitHub's security features documentation
tasks.deliverable: Link and list 3 security features available

tasks.task: Find documentation on Dependabot
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain what it does

tasks.task: Find OWASP's secure coding practices
tasks.deliverable: Link and 3 practices relevant to Python

tasks.task: Find how to safely manage secrets in GitHub Actions
tasks.deliverable: Link and explain best practices

bonus.task: Enable Dependabot on one of your repositories
